description: Amp up your style quotient on the streets with these fashionable low top casual shoes from red tape. Incorporating the conservative monk strap, this pair adds style details inspired by downtown cool. Wear these with tonal denims and a monochrome tee and throw on a jacket for dressy dos. Upper Two tone leather upper Padded tongue with a leather upper and fabric lining for a comfortable and breathable wear Midfoot strap with velcro closure Low ankle for better support to the lower leg Complete inner fabric lining for breathable comfort Padded fabric footbed for all-day comfort and sweat protection Upper adhered to the outsole for durability Stitch details on the upper Outsole Durable rubber outsole with arrow-shaped lugs throughout for maximum grip and traction shoe care Wipe leather surface with dry, clean cloth to remove dust Use a branded leather conditioner to maintain shine Do not store in direct sunlight
